title: VimFu — :v/{pattern}/{cmd} Inverse Global
description: The :v command (or :g!) is the inverse of :g. It executes a command on lines that do NOT match the pattern.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
keep: apple
remove this
keep: banana
junk line
keep: cherry
more junk
keep: date

steps.say: Colon V is the inverse of colon G. It acts on lines that don't match the pattern.
Delete every line that does NOT contain the word keep.
Three junk lines deleted. Only the lines with keep remain. Colon V targeted the non-matching lines.
Colon V. The inverse global. Act on lines that don't match. Think of it as keep the matches, act on the rest.
